Fluorine; bromine exports by country

in 2024

  • Facebook
  • Twitter
  • Linkedin
  • Google Plus
  • Reddit
  • Stumble Upon
  • Delicious
  • Email
Change selection (Reporter, Year, Trade Flow, Partner and HS 6 digit Product)
In 2024, Top exporters of Fluorine; bromine are Israel ($126,935.00K , 55,086,500 Kg), Jordan ($48,108.74K , 20,048,400 Kg), Japan ($41,447.96K , 10,418,500 Kg), United States ($18,081.09K , 4,847,770 Kg), India ($16,819.57K , 7,239,320 Kg).

HS Nomenclature used HS 1988/92 (H0)
HS Code 280130: Fluorine; bromine


Please note: Exports is gross exports and Imports is gross imports
